creator: dor.bsd@xm0.uk
text:
Created attachment 212735
net-mgmt/prometheus2: Update to 2.17.1

This patch updates net-mgmt/prometheus2 to 2.17.1, a minor bugfix and enhancement release.

A full changelog can be read at:
https://github.com/prometheus/prometheus/releases/tag/v2.17.0
and
https://github.com/prometheus/prometheus/releases/tag/v2.17.1

-David
